name: place_sell_order
description: Place a sell order to sell cryptocurrency from your account and deposit the proceeds to your linked payment method. Specify the amount in crypto or fiat currency.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The ID of the cryptocurrency account to sell from.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The currency for the amount (e.g., BTC to sell a specific crypto amount).

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: The ID of the payment method to deposit proceeds into.

parameters.name: commit
parameters.description: If false, the sell is not immediately executed (default true).
